hooks.command: PY=python; command -v py >/dev/null 2>&1 && PY='py -3'; command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && PY=python3; $PY "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/provenance_gate.py" --hook stop
PY=python; command -v py >/dev/null 2>&1 && PY='py -3'; command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && PY=python3; $PY "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/provenance_gate.py" --hook posttool
